summary: Project to create a game (details TBD).

existing_features.title: Add a playable in-browser game to the frontend (single-player) with clear rules, win/lose conditions, and keyboard + on-screen controls suitable for desktop and mobile.
Implement a persistent high-score system tied to the signed-in Internet Identity principal, including saving a user’s best score and showing a global leaderboard.

Create and apply a coherent visual theme for the game UI (colors, typography, layout, and component styling) and use it consistently across the game screens (menu, gameplay HUD, game over, leaderboard). Avoid blue/purple as primary theme colors.

projectName: Add a playable game experience to the app
